pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 75: RPC call creates survey with exact title; export_result.sh queries database for this survey
Task description and export_result.sh line 18 which queries for target survey with this exact title
setup_task.sh line 83 creates group with this name; export_result.sh lines 60-62 verify it is removed from target survey
Task description and export_result.sh line 66 queries for group with this exact name
Task description line 4 specifies this code; export_result.sh line 72 queries for question with title='AI_USAGE'
LimeSurvey Manual (https://www.limesurvey.org/manual/Question_types) confirms L = List (Radio); task description specifies Type: List (Radio); verifier.py line 73 expects type='L'
Task description line 4 specifies this code; export_result.sh line 79 queries for question with title='INNOVATION_IDEA'
LimeSurvey Manual confirms T = Long free text; task description specifies Type: Long free text; verifier.py line 86 accepts type='T' or 'U'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on LimeSurvey and requires copying survey 'Employee Pulse 2024' to create 'Employee Pulse 2025', removing the '2024 Initiatives' group, creating the '2025 Strategic Focus' group, and adding two questions: Q1 'AI_USAGE' with type L (List Radio) and Q2 'INNOVATION_IDEA' with type T (Long free text). All survey data is synthetically generated during task setup using LimeSurvey's JSON-RPC API. The task is verified through database queries checking for specific survey/group/question existence and properties.
